evidence: "Christian films are getting better and better."
"Band of Brothers is masterful, a story powerfully and wonderfully, and well told."
"It is a beautiful story, well told, and I will buy it because it is one of the few DVD movies I would put in a home library."
"The story is concise yet professionally done."
"The series certainly comes out better than many current movies in the theatre."
"It does not go overboard. It is accurate, believable, yet told in with the most modern means of film making."
"I was rather struck by the quality of writing AND production."
"I think Churches could use it profitably to talk about faith and how it should express itself in day to day life."
"You will understand how soldiers become a band of brothers. I swear, you feel like you are there."
"It tells a pungent, concise story of what happened in Benghazi."
"Emotional response. I have not read the book."
"It is a beautiful story, well told, and I will buy it because it is one of the few DVD movies I would put in a home library."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for well-produced documentaries and historical narratives, particularly those with Christian themes. They appreciate quality storytelling that evokes emotional responses and prefer slower-paced narratives that allow for deeper engagement with the material.
